content:
Done. Commit `d937c4cc` pushed to `3413-chore-update-homepage-welcome-text`.

**What changed:** `src/app/(frontend)/page.tsx` — the h1 for logged-out users now reads "Welcome from kody — verify run 1778739915427" instead of "Welcome to your new project."

The draft PR #3414 will update and Vercel will redeploy the same preview URL.
